Changed_Network.name: DFFlagResetNetworkOwnerOnRemovePrimitive2
Changed_Network.mechanism: Resets the network ownership of an object when it is removed from the game.
Changed_Network.purpose: Ensures that players do not retain control over objects that are no longer in the game, improving gameplay fairness.
